designConstraints: Must use 8px spacing unit grid system with scale values [4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, 48, 64]px
Background hierarchy: deep-navy (#0F172A) → navy-surface (#1E293B) → navy-raised (#293548) for card elevation layers
Maximum 3 levels of visual hierarchy across the page layout
Content max-width of 1280px centered within 1440px viewport with 24px margins and 24px gutters on a 12-column grid
All interactive elements must meet minimum touch target size of 44×44px
Border radius tokens: small=6px for badges/chips, medium=10px for rows/inputs, large=16px for cards
Typography: DM Sans (display) for headings and labels, DM Mono (body) for numeric/data values
Elevation level 1 (0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)) for standard cards; level 2 (0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)) for dropdowns and chart tooltips
Gold-amber (#F59E0B) as the primary CTA and active accent color; teal-success (#14B8A6) for positive trends; coral-error (#F87171) for negative trends and over-budget states
Motion: normal duration 300ms with cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) easing for chart transitions; fast 150ms for hover states
Focus ring: 2px gold-amber outline with 2px offset on all interactive elements
Disabled state opacity: 0.38 for unavailable controls (e.g., ExportCSVButton with no data)
TopBar, MonthSelector, NavigationTabs, and SettingsDialog must be visually consistent with dashboard and add-expense pages as shared components
Desktop-first layout at 1440px viewport; tablet breakpoint at 768px with single-column card stacking
ChartTypeToggle must be visually grouped with DailySpendingChart as an inline control, not a standalone element
ExportCSVButton must be right-aligned below all content cards, consistent with the page's right-margin boundary
NoDataEmptyState must occupy the full content area below the MonthSelector when no data exists for the selected month
Stat cells in PeriodSummaryHeader must be displayed in a horizontal three-column row at desktop width
Category color tokens (color_hex from Category model) must be used consistently across CategoryDonutChart (dashboard), StackedCategoryBar, and CategoryDetailRow for visual continuity
referencePatterns: Three-stat summary header pattern: horizontal row of StatCell components each containing a label, primary numeric value (DM Mono), and TrendIndicator badge — consistent with fintech dashboard period summaries

Card-based data display pattern: each analytical section (DailySpendingChart, TopCategoriesCard, BiggestExpensesCard, MonthComparisonCard) wrapped in navy-surface cards with large border radius (16px) and elevation level 1
Toggleable chart type pattern: ChartTypeToggle as a segmented pill control (bar/line) anchored to the top-right of the DailySpendingChart card header
Dashed average line overlay pattern: AverageDashedLine rendered as a horizontal reference line across the chart canvas using gold-amber (#F59E0B) with a dashed stroke
Chart tooltip pattern: ChartTooltip appears on hover/focus at elevation level 2 with navy-raised background, silver-text label, and DM Mono numeric value
Stacked horizontal bar pattern: StackedCategoryBar as a full-width segmented bar using category color_hex values, with proportional segment widths based on percentage field from CategoryAggregate

Per-row progress indicator pattern: CategoryDetailRow contains category color swatch, name, amount (DM Mono), percentage label, and an inline progress bar — consistent with dashboard BudgetSummaryCard ProgressBar usage
Ranked list pattern: RankedExpenseRow displays rank number, merchant name, category chip, amount (DM Mono), and date — tappable row navigates to add-expense for editing
Month-over-month comparison bar pattern: ComparisonBars renders two horizontal bars (current vs previous month) with proportional widths and SpendingDiffBadge showing delta percentage
SpendingDiffBadge pattern: pill-shaped badge using teal-success for positive (spending down) and coral-error for negative (spending up) delta, with trend arrow icon
Filter/navigation bar pattern: MonthSelector in TopBar area consistent with dashboard implementation — left/right chevron navigation with month-year label
Empty state pattern: NoDataEmptyState centered in content area with illustration, heading (DM Sans heading-2), body text (DM Mono body), and optional CTA — consistent with dashboard EmptyState
Navigation tabs pattern: NavigationTabs fixed at bottom with Home, Add Expense, and Insights tabs — Insights tab in active/selected state on this page
Right-aligned utility action pattern: ExportCSVButton positioned flush-right below all cards, using a secondary/outline button style to avoid competing with primary CTAs
accessibilityRequirements: WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 for all text — silver-text (#CBD5E1) on navy-surface (#1E293B) achieves ~10:1; gold-amber (#F59E0B) on deep-navy (#0F172A) must be verified at 4.5:1 minimum for label text
All chart elements (DailySpendingChart, StackedCategoryBar, ComparisonBars) must provide screen-reader-accessible text alternatives via aria-label or visually hidden summary tables
ChartTooltip must be keyboard-accessible and announced by screen readers when chart data points receive focus
TrendIndicator icons must include aria-label describing the trend direction and magnitude (e.g., 'Up 12% from last month') and not rely solely on color to convey meaning
SpendingDiffBadge must not rely solely on color (teal vs coral) to communicate positive/negative delta — must include directional text or icon with aria-label
RankedExpenseRow interactive rows must have role='button' or be implemented as anchor/button elements with descriptive aria-label including merchant, amount, and date
ChartTypeToggle segmented control must use role='radiogroup' with individual role='radio' elements and keyboard arrow-key navigation
ExportCSVButton must have a descriptive aria-label: 'Export expenses for [Month Year] as CSV'
MonthSelector navigation controls (previous/next month chevrons) must have aria-label='Previous month' and aria-label='Next month'
NoDataEmptyState must be announced to screen readers when rendered, using aria-live='polite' on the content region
Focus ring must be visible on all interactive elements: 2px gold-amber (#F59E0B) outline with 2px offset, meeting WCAG 2.4.7 Focus Visible
NavigationTabs must use role='tablist' with role='tab' for each tab and aria-selected='true' on the active Insights tab
PeriodSummaryHeader StatCell components must use appropriate heading hierarchy — section heading as h2, stat labels as visually styled spans not headings
CategoryDetailRow progress bars must include aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax, and aria-label describing the category and percentage
All card sections must have descriptive aria-labelledby or aria-label attributes linking to their visible heading for landmark navigation

Keyboard navigation must traverse all interactive elements in logical DOM order: TopBar → MonthSelector → PeriodSummaryHeader → DailySpendingChart → ChartTypeToggle → TopCategoriesCard → BiggestExpensesCard → MonthComparisonCard → ExportCSVButton → NavigationTabs
dataModelDependencies: Expense entity — fields: id, amount, merchant, category_id, date, payment_method_id, note, currency; used by BiggestExpensesCard (RankedExpenseRow) and CSV export via GET /api/expenses/top and GET /api/expenses/export
Category entity — fields: id, name, color_token, color_hex, icon; used by TopCategoriesCard (StackedCategoryBar, CategoryDetailRow) and RankedExpenseRow category chip display via GET /api/categories
Budget entity — fields: id, month, year, amount, currency; used by PeriodSummaryHeader for budget context and MonthComparisonCard via GET /api/budgets
DailyAggregate entity — fields: id, date, total_amount, transaction_count, month, year; used by DailySpendingChart and AverageDashedLine calculation via GET /api/aggregates/daily

CategoryAggregate entity — fields: id, category_id, month, year, total_amount, transaction_count, percentage; used by TopCategoriesCard (StackedCategoryBar segment widths, CategoryDetailRow progress indicators) via GET /api/aggregates/categories

MonthlyComparison entity — fields derived from GET /api/aggregates/monthly-summary response (MonthlyComparison schema_ref): total spent, daily average, transaction count, comparison deltas vs previous month; used by PeriodSummaryHeader (StatCell, TrendIndicator) and MonthComparisonCard (ComparisonBars, SpendingDiffBadge)

UserSettings entity — fields: currency, locale; used globally for currency symbol and number formatting across all monetary displays (StatCell amounts, RankedExpenseRow amounts, CategoryDetailRow amounts) via GET /api/settings
